name: telegram
description: Send messages and files via Telegram Bot API

telegram.setup.title: Setup Guide
telegram.setup.description:
1. Open Telegram and search for @BotFather
2. Send /newbot and follow the prompts to create a bot
3. Copy the Bot Token and paste it below
4. Open your new bot in Telegram and send /start
5. Click "Fetch Chat ID" to auto-detect your chat
6. Click "Send Test Message" to verify the connection

telegram.fetchChatId.title: Fetch Chat ID
telegram.fetchChatId.description: Send /start to your bot first, then click to auto-detect

telegram.defaultChatId.title: Default Chat ID
telegram.defaultChatId.description: Default chat/group ID for sending messages

telegram.testMessage.title: Send Test Message
telegram.testMessage.description: Send a hello message to verify your connection

telegram.notifyOnAgentComplete.title: Notify on agent completion
telegram.notifyOnAgentComplete.description: Send a Telegram message when an AI agent completes a task

telegram.enablePolling.description: Enable inbound message polling from Telegram

tools.title: Send Telegram Message
tools.description: Send a text message to a Telegram chat. Chat ID is pre-configured — just provide the message.

tools.title: Send File via Telegram
tools.description: Send a file with optional caption to a Telegram chat. Chat ID is pre-configured.
